extra.reason: Implemented and tested. All 39 E2E tests passing.
Implemented and tested. All 39 E2E tests passing.
Implemented and tested. All 39 E2E tests passing.
Changed toast from green to menu-matching gray with elevation shadow

Fixed debounce sync bug (Event→skipFileSync), reduced interval 5s→2s, added unsaved-edit conflict guard, deduped escapeHtml, added a11y attributes, history memory cap, fixed string throw in Editor.save()
Added 7 bullet tests: nested bullets (2-space indent), ordered lists (1./2./3.), mixed ordered+unordered, deep nesting (4-space indent level 2)

Fixed bullet Enter behavior: preserved newlines in parseMarkdown output, kept raw '-' marker in textContent (CSS ::before shows • visually), so nextListAction can detect line boundaries and continue/exit lists correctly

Fixed: debounce sync bug (Event→skipFileSync), duplicate escapeHtml, a11y attributes (aria-labels, aria-live), history memory cap (10MB), string throw in Editor.save(), unsaved-edit conflict guard in sync
Updated README with feature list, usage instructions, and project metadata

Fixed debounce highlight to fire on beforeinput events (agent-browser keyboard type compatibility). Added saveOffset/restoreOffset for reliable cursor preservation across re-renders. Created 21 key-by-key interaction tests, all passing. Covers: unordered/ordered typing, Enter continuation, double-Enter exit, Tab sub-bullets, Shift-Tab outdent, cursor position verification, and raw textContent format.

Tab/Shift-Tab already works correctly. indentSelection() adds/removes 2-space indent on the current line, and parseMarkdown correctly re-renders nested list items. Verified by tab_subbullet and shift_tab_outdent tests.

Ordered and unordered lists already behave identically. nextListAction() handles both types with the same logic: Enter on non-empty adds new item (with - or incremented number), Enter on empty exits, Tab indents, Shift-Tab outdents. Verified by matching test coverage for both list types.

Cursor stability fixed with saveOffset/restoreOffset. Debounce at 30ms minimizes flicker. Marker jumping during rapid typing would require visual TUI verification - screenshots taken in test-results/. Core functionality verified by 21 automated tests.
Tests implemented and passing
Tests implemented and passing
Tests implemented and passing
Tests implemented and passing
Tests implemented and passing
URLs in [text](url) are now clickable <a> tags, textContent preserved. 6 tests passing.
Outlook paste works: MsoListParagraph, numbered lists, bullet glyphs, standard <ul> all convert to markdown. Fixed blank lines between MsoListParagraph items. 7 tests passing.
Shift+Enter inserts blank line before list. 1 test passing.
Moved spacing from contentSpan to markerSpan. Grid column-gap handles visual spacing. No extra space on new items. 2 tests passing.
Split list item at cursor position on Enter. 4 tests passing.
Playwright tests working, all agent-browser tests converted
All tests converted to Playwright, 56 tests passing with real keyboard events
Fixed numbered list alignment (grid max-content → 3.5em) and added 2 alignment tests + 7 folder sync tests with mock FSA
Added raw text fallback to nextListAction/insertListPrefix/exitList so rapid Enter works before debounce renders DOM
Added 26 multiple lists tests covering type switching, nesting, rapid typing, exit behavior, separators. All check cursor position after keystrokes.
Already implemented: captureCursor() and restoreCursor() with list-aware {type: 'list', itemIndex, contentOffset} support exist in index.html
Duplicate of dk3.1, already implemented
Already implemented: compositionstart/compositionend handlers with composing flag exist in index.html

Added stable item tracking with data-cursor-target attribute and pendingCursor.listItemIndex. beforeinput handler now uses tracked index instead of items.length-1. fixCursor listener uses marked item fallback.
Added data-cursor-target marker on target item after highlight(). beforeinput and fixCursor listeners both use marked item + index tracking for stable identity across re-renders.
Added 7 middle-of-list editing tests: split at start/mid/end of middle item, split then type, multiple splits, first/last item continuation. All pass.
Added 6 nested list cursor tests: Enter continues at same level, Tab indent, Shift+Tab outdent, double Enter exit, cursor survives re-render, nested ordered list numbering. All pass.
Added 4 backspace boundary tests: exit list at start, merge items, middle of item, progressive exit. All pass.
Added 6 paste tests: list into paragraph, list into list item, multi-line text, ordered list, nested list item context, HTML list conversion. All pass.

Added unified cursor abstraction with type: 'selection' support. captureCursor() now detects non-collapsed selections and captures {type: 'selection', context: 'list'|'plain', start, end}. restoreCursor() restores selections using findNodeAtTextOffset() helper. All existing tests pass.

Added 5 selection tests: paragraph selection, list item selection, nested list selection, select-all replace, delete removes selection. All pass. Unified cursor abstraction supports type: 'selection' for both plain and list contexts.

All 10 sub-tasks completed. Summary of changes:

HIGH PRIORITY (P0):
- dk3.1/dk3.11: List-aware cursor restoration already existed (captureCursor/restoreCursor with type: 'list')
- dk3.2: Fixed cursor placement after list mutations - beforeinput handler now uses pendingCursor.listItemIndex instead of items.length-1
- dk3.3: Stable item tracking - data-cursor-target attribute marks target item across re-renders

MEDIUM PRIORITY (P2):
- dk3.4: Added 7 middle-of-list editing tests (all pass)
- dk3.5: Added 6 nested list cursor tests (all pass)
- dk3.6: Unified cursor abstraction with type: 'selection' support
- dk3.7: Added 5 selection tests (all pass)
- dk3.8: IME protection already existed (compositionstart/compositionend handlers)
- dk3.9: Added 6 paste tests (all pass)
- dk3.10: Added 4 backspace boundary tests (all pass)

Total: 121 tests passing, 1 pre-existing failure unrelated to these changes.

Added 8 multi-list editing tests covering: edit first list after second exists, arrow key navigation between lists, typing into first list with second present, split isolation, two lists with multiple items, ordered+unordered combo, editing specific items across lists, and numbering preservation. Also fixed bug where pendingCursor.skip redirected input to wrong list when cursor moved programmatically.
